thought.text:
Okay, I will generate a modern landing page for a coffee shop in the current directory. I'll use `npm create vite@latest . -- --template react` to start, and ensure I use Tailwind CSS, Lucide React icons, and follow the premium aesthetic rules in CLAUDE.md.

First, I need to run the `npm create vite@latest . -- --template react` command.
